_purpose: Human comments on the sibling .md file, written by the noteaerator viewer. Agents are expected to read these, act on them, and DELETE this file when done. Removing all entries also auto-deletes this file.

comments.body: Sample sidecar comment — open welcome.md in the viewer and you should see this rendered as a yellow card right after the 'A mermaid diagram' heading. Delete this file (or click the × on the card) once you've read this.
Second comment, anchored to the paragraph under 'Human-to-AI comments'. Demonstrates that multiple comments per file work and each gets its own × delete button.

Row-level demo: this comment is anchored to the 'Renderer' row (row 3) of the table above, NOT the whole table. Hover any row in the table and click the small + that appears, or right-click a row, to add a row-scoped comment.
